scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @queue-tracker/shared && npm run build --workspace @queue-tracker/api && npm run build --workspace @queue-tracker/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @queue-tracker/shared && npm run lint --workspace @queue-tracker/api && npm run lint --workspace @queue-tracker/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @queue-tracker/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @queue-tracker/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @queue-tracker/web
